hero.title: Ace Your Python Backend Interview
hero.description: Prepare for Python backend interviews with topic-wise guides, coding problems, system design concepts, and behavioral tips used by top tech companies.

data structures & algorithms.description: Master arrays, linked lists, trees, graphs, DP, and problem-solving patterns.

python internals.description: Deep dive into GIL, memory management, decorators, generators, and advanced Python.

system design (backend).description: Design scalable systems, databases, caching, message queues, and microservices.

database & sql.description: SQL queries, indexing, normalization, transactions, and NoSQL basics.

api & web fundamentals.description: REST, GraphQL, HTTP methods, status codes, authentication, and web security.

concurrency & parallelism.description: Threading, asyncio, multiprocessing, race conditions, and locks in Python.

behavioral & hr round.description: STAR method, leadership principles, conflict resolution, and company-specific prep.

mock interviews & problems.description: Real interview questions, timed coding challenges, and mock interview simulations.

seo.title: Python Backend Interview Preparation Guide
seo.description: Comprehensive interview preparation for Python backend roles: DSA, system design, Python internals, database, concurrency, behavioral questions, and mock interviews.
